title: Single Cell Atlas: a single-cell multi-omics human cell encyclopedia.
author: Pan L Parini P Tremmel R Loscalzo J Lauschke VM Maron BA Paci P Ernberg I Tan NS Liao Z Yin W Rengarajan S Li X SCA Consortium
content: S-EPMC11027364 PMC11027364 Single Cell Atlas: a single-cell multi-omics human cell encyclopedia. Single-cell sequencing datasets are key in biology and medicine for unraveling insights into heterogeneous cell populations with unprecedented resolution.
